title: MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BAR MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers a referral panel that lists lawyers willing to provide volunteer legal assistance (pro bono) primarily related to the Servicemembers' Civil Relief Act (SCRA), which provides additional legal protection to persons entering or called to active duty in the US Armed Forces. Many volunteer lawyers also assist with family law, consumer/credit law, real property/landlord-tenant law, and estate planning issues. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Active military personnel and their dependents in need of legal help, immediately before, during, and after deployment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 620-0222 Main phone (800) 452-8260 Toll-free Lawyer Referral Service (503) 684-3763 Oregon Army National Guard (971) 355-3455 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the Oregon Army National Guard for an authorization number (military reference or "MR") and then call the Lawyer Referral Service for a referral to a participating lawyer. FEES: No fee for referral. Volunteer lawyers are expect to provide up to 2 hours of legal advice at no charge. It is up to the lawyer and client to decide whether to continue the lawyer/client relationship beyond the pro bono consultation. DOCUMENTS: Proof of service information if possible AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Lawyer Referral Services * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CLIENT ASSISTANCE OFFICE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - LEGAL LINKS LEGAL SERVICES - LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE LEGAL SERVICES - MODEST MEANS PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BAR
